datasets.name: 0008342d
queryLines: SELECT * FROM himalaya.gold.vw_expeditions

datasets.name: 419b4f24
queryLines: SELECT * FROM himalaya.gold.vw_members

datasets.name: 73de7c13
queryLines: SELECT ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN `Success` = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(`Expedition ID`), 0), 3) AS `Average Success Rate (%)`
FROM himalaya.gold.vw_expeditions

datasets.name: a2456164
queryLines: SELECT CONCAT(MIN(`Year`), ' — ', MAX(`Year`)) AS `Years of Data`
FROM himalaya.gold.vw_expeditions

datasets.name: 20d5f732
queryLines:
SELECT 
    `Year`,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN `Success` = true THEN `Expedition ID` END) AS `Successes`,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN `Success` = false THEN `Expedition ID` END) AS `Failures`
FROM himalaya.gold.vw_expeditions
GROUP BY `Year`
ORDER BY `Year`

datasets.name: 6a7c060a
queryLines:
SELECT 
    `Mountain`,
    `First Ascent Year`,
    `First Ascent Season`,
    `First Ascent Country`,
    `First Ascent Members`,
    `Height (m)`
FROM himalaya.gold.vw_expeditions
WHERE `First Ascent Year` IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY `First Ascent Year` ASC
LIMIT 1

datasets.name: ee2219c2
queryLines:
SELECT `Mountain`, COUNT(DISTINCT `Expedition ID`) AS `Total Expeditions`
FROM himalaya.gold.vw_expeditions
GROUP BY `Mountain`
ORDER BY `Total Expeditions` DESC
LIMIT 1

datasets.name: 0b70b8f3
queryLines:
SELECT `Mountain`, MAX(`Height (m)`) AS `Height (m)`
FROM himalaya.gold.vw_expeditions
GROUP BY `Mountain`
ORDER BY `Height (m)` DESC
LIMIT 1

datasets.name: 4e95c6e2
queryLines:
SELECT `Mountain`,
    SUM(CASE WHEN `Success` = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS `Successful Expeditions`,
    COUNT(`Expedition ID`) AS `Total Expeditions`,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN `Success` = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(`Expedition ID`), 0), 1) AS `Success Rate (%)`
FROM himalaya.gold.vw_expeditions
GROUP BY `Mountain`
HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN `Success` = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= 1
ORDER BY `Success Rate (%)` ASC
LIMIT 1

datasets.name: d2e00c57
queryLines:
SELECT
  `Mountain`,
  SUM(`Deaths`) AS total_deaths,
  COUNT(*) AS expedition_count,
  SUM(`Deaths`) / COUNT(*) AS deaths_per_expedition
FROM
  himalaya.gold.vw_expeditions
GROUP BY
  `Mountain`
ORDER BY
  deaths_per_expedition DESC
LIMIT 1

datasets.name: ae628b71
queryLines:
SELECT 
    `Mountain`,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN `Success` = true THEN 1 END)/COUNT(`Expedition ID`) AS `Success Rate`
FROM himalaya.gold.vw_expeditions
GROUP BY `Mountain`

datasets.name: ef058aa1
queryLines:
SELECT 
    `Mountain`,
    ROUND(SUM(`Deaths`) / SUM(`Total Members`), 3) AS `Death Rate`
FROM himalaya.gold.vw_expeditions
GROUP BY `Mountain`

datasets.name: 0ff92a89
queryLines:
SELECT 
    `Mountain`,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN `Oxygen Used` = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(`Expedition ID`), 3) AS `Oxygen Usage Rate`
FROM himalaya.gold.vw_expeditions
GROUP BY `Mountain`

datasets.name: 81e05ae2
queryLines: SELECT DISTINCT `Nationality`, COUNT(DISTINCT `Name`) FROM himalaya.gold.vw_members GROUP BY `Nationality`

datasets.name: f6a3271a
queryLines:
SELECT `Name`, `Nationality`, `Summit Date`, `Year of Birth`, 
       YEAR(`Summit Date`) - `Year of Birth` AS `Age`
FROM himalaya.gold.vw_members
WHERE `Summit Date` IS NOT NULL 
  AND `Year of Birth` IS NOT NULL
  AND YEAR(`Summit Date`) - `Year of Birth` IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY `Age` ASC
LIMIT 1

datasets.name: 7cd3b4bf
queryLines:
SELECT `Name`, `Nationality`, `Summit Date`, `Year of Birth`, 
       YEAR(`Summit Date`) - `Year of Birth` AS `Age`
FROM himalaya.gold.vw_members
WHERE `Summit Date` IS NOT NULL 
  AND `Year of Birth` IS NOT NULL
  AND YEAR(`Summit Date`) - `Year of Birth` IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY `Age` DESC
LIMIT 1

datasets.name: 1a2dee3b
queryLines:
SELECT 
    ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN `Leader` = false THEN `Year of Birth` END)) AS `Avg YOB Non-Leader`,
    ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN `Leader` = true  THEN `Year of Birth` END)) AS `Avg YOB Leader`,
    ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN `Leader` = false THEN `Year of Birth` END)) -
    ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN `Leader` = true  THEN `Year of Birth` END)) AS `Years Older (Leaders)`
FROM himalaya.gold.vw_members
WHERE `Year of Birth` IS NOT NULL
  AND `Leader` IS NOT NULL

datasets.name: 7ac644fc
queryLines:
SELECT `Expedition ID`, SUM(CASE WHEN `Leader` = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS `Leader Count`, `Mountain`
FROM himalaya.gold.vw_members
GROUP BY `Expedition ID`, `Mountain`
ORDER BY `leader count` DESC

datasets.name: c1ad35cb
queryLines:
SELECT `Name`, COUNT(DISTINCT `Expedition ID`) AS `Expedition Count`
FROM himalaya.gold.vw_members
WHERE `Name` IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY `Name`
ORDER BY `Expedition Count` DESC

datasets.name: edd49ace
queryLines:
SELECT
  `Season`,
  COUNT(*) AS `Total Expeditions`,
  SUM(CASE WHEN `Success` = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS `Successful Expeditions`,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN `Success` = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100, 2) AS `Success Rate %`
FROM himalaya.gold.vw_expeditions
GROUP BY `Season`
ORDER BY `Success Rate %` DESC

datasets.name: 8f01966f
queryLines:
SELECT
  CASE WHEN `Summit Hired` > 0 THEN 'Hired'
       ELSE 'Non-Hired' END AS `Hired Status`,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN `Success` = true THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 3) AS `Avg Success Rate %`
FROM himalaya.gold.vw_expeditions
GROUP BY `Hired Status`

datasets.name: 9d303895
queryLines:
SELECT
  CASE WHEN `Oxygen Used` = true THEN 'Oxygen Used'
       ELSE 'No Oxygen' END AS `Oxygen Status`,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN `Success` = true THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 2) AS `Avg Success Rate %`
FROM himalaya.gold.vw_expeditions
GROUP BY `Oxygen Status`

datasets.name: 45536e6e
queryLines:
SELECT
  CASE WHEN `Sherpa` = true THEN 'Sherpa'
       ELSE 'Non-Sherpa' END AS `Sherpa Status`,
  COUNT(*) AS `Total Members`,
  SUM(CASE WHEN `Death` = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS `Total Deaths`
FROM himalaya.gold.vw_members
GROUP BY `Sherpa Status`

datasets.name: e23ab8a2
queryLines:
SELECT
    SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER () AS `All Deaths`,
    'Oxygen' AS `Situation`,
    CASE 
        WHEN `Oxygen Used` = true THEN 'Oxygen Used' 
        ELSE 'No Oxygen' 
    END AS `Situation Detail`,
    `Cause of Death`,
    COUNT(*) AS `Deaths`
FROM himalaya.gold.vw_members
WHERE `Death` = true
  AND `Cause of Death` IS NOT NULL
  AND `Cause of Death` != 'Unknown'
GROUP BY `Situation Detail`, `Cause of Death`

UNION ALL

SELECT
    SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER () AS `All Deaths`,
    'Hired' AS `Situation`,
    CASE 
        WHEN `Hired` = true THEN 'Hired' 
        ELSE 'Non-Hired' 
    END AS `Situation Detail`,
    `Cause of Death`,
    COUNT(*) AS `Deaths`
FROM himalaya.gold.vw_members
WHERE `Death` = true
  AND `Cause of Death` IS NOT NULL
  AND `Cause of Death` != 'Unknown'
GROUP BY `Situation Detail`, `Cause of Death`
ORDER BY `Situation` DESC, `Situation Detail`, `Cause of Death`

datasets.name: 9117656d
queryLines:
SELECT MODE(`Weather Condition`) AS `Most Common Weather Condition`
FROM himalaya.gold.vw_expeditions
WHERE `Weather Condition` IS NOT NULL

datasets.name: d78baaf2
queryLines:
SELECT `Weather Condition`,
    ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN `Success` = true THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 2) AS `Success Rate %`
FROM himalaya.gold.vw_expeditions
WHERE `Weather Condition` IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY `Weather Condition`
ORDER BY `Success Rate %` DESC

datasets.name: 9daeb24f
queryLines:
SELECT `Weather Condition`,
    SUM(`Deaths`) AS `Total Deaths`
FROM himalaya.gold.vw_expeditions
WHERE `Weather Condition` IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY `Weather Condition`
ORDER BY `Total Deaths` DESC

datasets.name: b1cfba84
queryLines:
SELECT 
    `Snowfall (cm)`,
    ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN `Success` = true THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) * 100, 2) AS `Success Rate %`
FROM himalaya.gold.vw_expeditions
WHERE `Snowfall (cm)` IS NOT NULL
  AND `Weather Condition` IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY `Snowfall (cm)`
ORDER BY `Snowfall (cm)`
